name: Steps to file workers comp after ladder fall at work in Boise?

mainEntity.name: Steps to file workers comp after ladder fall at work in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: Report to boss, see doctor, submit claim form.[5]
acceptedAnswer.description:
**1. Report to employer within 180 days (Utah) or 60 days (Idaho). 2. Get medical treatment. 3. File formal claim form.**[5]

Employer notifies insurer; if approved, benefits start. Denial triggers appeal to state commission.

- Use state-specific forms (Utah Labor Commission).
- Attorney files if complex.
- Discovery/mediation follows disputes.

Expect 2-4 weeks for initial decision. Track all communications.

description: Report to boss, see doctor, submit claim form.[5]
